title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates:
Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates!
